title: chrysanthemum roxburghii
intro: Chrysanthemum roxburghii, also known as the hardy chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum roxburghii include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and improving respiratory health. In traditional herbal preparations, the flowers of Chrysanthemum roxburghii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
